meta_title: For Founders: idea validation to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to idea validation and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Idea Validation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use idea validation to overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP fast.
content.answer_block: A lack of portfolio is a vanity metric, not a business blocker. Founders solve this by validating ideas through high-intent landing pages and rapid MVPs. By leveraging AI-assisted coding tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can transform a raw concept into a functional, revenue-generating asset in days, not months.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the founder's greatest adversary. You have the vision, but your GitHub profile is a digital ghost town, and potential users are skeptical of unproven software. You feel the crushing weight of 'social proof' demands, fearing that without a decade of shipping history, your breakthrough idea will die in obscurity before it ever hits the market.

But here is the secret the incumbents won't tell you: the market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about your solution to their pain. By shifting your focus from building a portfolio to validating a specific, high-value problem, you bypass the need for history entirely. We are going to turn your lack of experience into your greatest asset: pure, unadulterated speed.

steps.title: Define the High-Pain Niche
steps.description: Don't build for everyone. Identify a micro-niche with a burning problem that keeps them awake at night. This is your foundation for validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Generate a list of 5 high-pain, underserved niches in the creator economy that would pay $29/mo for an automated workflow tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --query 'market pain points for independent newsletter creators 2024'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Scope
steps.description: Strip your idea to the absolute minimum feature set that solves the primary problem. If it doesn't lead to a conversion, cut it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean MVP feature specification for a tool that solves [INSERT PROBLEM]. Focus on a single user flow that delivers 'Aha!' moment in under 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file mvp_spec.md --content 'define core features only'

steps.title: Generate the Landing Page
steps.description: Your landing page is your primary validation tool. It must sell the value, not the features, to capture interest before you write a single line of backend code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting landing page structure using Tailwind CSS and React. Include a clear value proposition, social proof placeholders, and a waitlist CTA.

steps.title: Implement the Core Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold your backend services. Focus on integrating the AI logic that provides your unique value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for a Supabase-connected API that handles user signups and triggers an AI response based on [SPECIFIC INPUT].

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your MVP to a live environment. Your goal isn't perfection; it's getting your first 10 users to sign up and provide feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration for Vercel and outline a 3-step plan to drive traffic to this MVP using cold outreach.

pro_tips: Never build an authentication system from scratch; use Clerk or Supabase Auth to save 20+ hours of development time.
The 'Pre-sell' is the ultimate validation; add a payment wall to your landing page before the product is finished to prove real intent.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests simultaneously with your features to ensure the MVP doesn't break under early user load.
Don't worry about scaling for millions of users; optimize for the first 10 users who will actually pay you.
Treat your landing page as a living document; use hotjar or similar tools to see where users drop off and iterate daily.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus entirely on distribution. Spend 80% of your time talking to potential users and 20% on code improvements based on their direct feedback.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a beginner; you are a founder with a shipped product. Stop waiting for permission to build and start shipping the solution the market is begging for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
